result.stderr:
CPMGen 0.1.7+7cdebd8efdb08009e3168814127895e5c72ce3c0
Copyright (C) 2026 purejoymind
USAGE:
Default behaviour:
  CPMGen
Convert only one project:
  CPMGen --project path/to/project.csproj
Specify the output directory, generates '../upDir/Directory.Packages.props':
  CPMGen --output-dir ../upDir

  -s, --solution      (Default: .) Specifies the directory to search for .sln
                      files, If this option is provided the project file
                      location option will be ignored.

  -p, --project       Specifies the directory to search for .csproj files.

  -o, --output-dir    (Default: .) The props file output directory.

  -k, --keep-attrs    (Default: false) Keeps the 'Version' attribute in the
                      .csproj files.

  -n, --no-backup     (Default: false) Disables the default backup option

  --backup-dir        (Default: .) The backup directory for .csproj files about
                      to be changed.

  --add-gitignore     (Default: false) Adds the backup directory to .gitignore
                      file. Creates one if not present

  --gitignore-dir     (Default: .) The directory for .gitignore file if there
                      isn't one existing.

  --help              Display this help screen.

  --version           Display version information.

options.description: Adds the backup directory to .gitignore file. Creates one if not present
The backup directory for .csproj files about to be changed.
The directory for .gitignore file if there isn't one existing.
Keeps the 'Version' attribute in the .csproj files.
Specifies the directory to search for .csproj files.
Specifies the directory to search for .sln files, If this option is provided the project file location option will be ignored.
